---
name: "Feature Request"
about: Describe a new feature, task, or user story.
title: "[FEAT] - Brief Title"
labels: 'feature, enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

**User Story**
<!-- Define the role and goal. -->
> **As a** [Player/AI Designer]
> **I want to** [specific action or mechanic]
> **So that** [value or fun outcome]

**Why**
<!-- Explain why this task is important for the gameplay. -->
*Example: This is critical for the "Bonk" feel, ensuring players feel rewarded for high-friction maneuvers.*
> 

**Acceptance Criteria**
<!-- Under what specific conditions will this task be considered "Done"? -->
- [ ] Condition 1
- [ ] Condition 2
- [ ] Condition 3

**Tasks**
<!-- What smaller development steps need to be completed? -->
- [ ] Step 1: 
- [ ] Step 2: 
- [ ] Step 3:
